violations.text: Thermometer is lacking in the stock room 2-door reach-in. All cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer inside the unit that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026

The doors to the outside, located at the store entrance, are not tight-fitting. Space observed at the bottom between the 2 doors. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving in the storefront open cold hold unit as well as the shelving in the reach-in cold hold units at the back of the store have an accumulation of black residue, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Shelving must be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025

Food equipment is not being washed, rinsed, and sanitized. There is no 3-bay sink available for this process. Establishment was not approved for sales of slushie (Icee) or coffee. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2023

Doors to the outside, located at the front of the store and in the receiving area, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2023
